planet.name: Saturn
planet.description: The ringed gas giant. Surrounded by a magnificent system of icy rings and numerous moons.

moons.name: Titan
moons.description: Saturn's largest moon. A world with thick atmosphere, methane lakes, and complex geology. Major hub for refueling and research in the outer solar system and beyond.

stations.name: Cassini Division Station
stations.description: Cargo Hub situated in the gap between Saturn's A and B rings. Named after the famous Cassini Division in Saturn's rings. Major supplier of Mars' Terraforming endeavor and Ganymede's farms.
